Life Plans Math Physics Reflection

Repost: Goals for this year

January 4, 2026

So I saw this on smbellanki's blog, and I thought it was a really cool way to set new year goals, so I am going to try it.

This is for 2026 year, so I am going to include every event in 2026.

Contest | Bronze | Silver | Gold | Platinum

F=ma 14 17 20 aleph

USAPhO QUal HM Bronze Gold

SAT 1500 1520 1560 aleph

AMC 12 95 105 120 135

Scioly 1medal 2 medal aleph aleph

USAMTS 30 HM aleph aleph

Robotics MakeStates aleph MakeNats aleph

Essay Competition Shortlist HighCommendation aleph aleph

Difficulty is set to be: Bronze - Doable with some effort - 1 point Silver - would require plenty of effort - 2 points Gold - Hard to achieve - 3 points Platinum - Almost impossible to achieve - 5 points

I am pretty much going for (In order): F=ma - Gold USAPhO - (not sure) SAT - Silver AMC 12 - Silver Scioly - Bronze USAMTS - Silver Robotics - Bronze, Essay competition - Bronze

So I guess I am going for average of silver, so

Less than 4 - what was I doing

Greater than 6 - ok this year wasn't wasted

Greater than 8 - A solid year

Greater than 10 - good

Greater than 13 - Great. Wouldn't have expected it

Greater than 16 - I would be astonished

Greater than 19 - unreal (25 max)

This chart may be inaccurate because there are some personal things not related to math/science, such as getting into a good college with early application(I'm a current junior). Doing so would instantly bring me above the "This year wasn't wasted" range..Stuff like GPA matters too, and I just feel like it's a given that I have to prioritize my grade in most situations. I also do want to get into a summer program but I'm not sure about which to apply to.

Now a brief explanation of my goals:

F=ma It is currently my main focus. I took physics honors (AP physics 1 mechanics curriculum) last year so I feel pretty confident, and am also taking AP physics C E&M (Which covers AP physics C Mechanics first half of the year), so I was quite exposed to these stuff. I am now reading hrk and I am on ch 7 (my plans didn't work out... I was busy..), and there are still things I have missed, and I find applying calculus to be a bit difficult because I am currently taking calc bc. So I'll see what happens.

USAPhO Basically continuation of F=ma. I would have to learn more topics, and stuff. It would be really great if I get to qualify, because I have a history of overstudying AIME and not making it to AIME. My ultimate goal with USAPhO would be to make USA team (or camp), but I have a long way to go. I still have next year unlike IMO which I have no chance of going to. Therefore this year is just basically a trial, and I also started in Dec 15 when AMC results came out, so it would be odd if I do good on it.

SAT I took it in December and got a 1420, 630 English and 790 math. I do have to say that I studied like 5 hrs, and I have a lot more room to improve. I didn't even study math and got a 790 lol. It was some random question, and I also didn't have time because I didn't practice time management lol. So my focus will be English, and if I get above 700 English, I am quitting SAT immediately, unless I feel bored.

AMC 12 This is kind of too far out in the future, so I have no idea if I would even study for it. Maybe I do want to qualify for AIME? but again AMC math is not fun and I would rather study olymath and focus on pumac. I would definitely study for it if I have time, but college apps might take a bit too long.. Therefore bronze is 95 because it seems like a score I could get if I studied like 20 hrs more on it.

Scioly Scioly medals are not hard to get, but it's hard if I start preparing less than a week before the competition. I haven't built anything, and I haven't studied anything. We might make it to the states this year, idk. I also only do 2 events this year for regionals, so that's why it's capped at 2 medals

USAMTS I am also screwed for this one as well, because I try to study physics, and cannot study physics, and waste time not doing anything, and such. Basically meaning I had no time to work on it. I want HM because I want to get a book and a shirt, seems like a cool prize. I probably won't get it though.

Robotics Basically we don't have time and our bot isn't close to being completed. I do both code and build, so I know that we don't have time to code the bot even if we get to finish building in time. Not sure how this would work. It also depends on the team, so I better get the leaders to motivate them.

Essay Competition This is basically referring to JLI essay competition, and I did get shortlisted last year, after writing an essay in 3 days. I basically got lucky. I am sure I'm going to spend more time on it, and I might write more than 1 this time. Getting someone to prove I didn't cheat might be painful as it was hard last year as well.

I feel like this year might be the most important year I had in my life, so I better work hard. Last year was also crucial because I could have score well on AMC, but I didn't so it doesn't matter.

and for me that might be reading this in December 2026, I hope you are proud of yourself.

Comments
